Both clubs are set in Zurich's most distinguished lakeside neighbourhoods. Accessible. Discreet. Designed to match the standard you hold in every other area of your life.

Response, Every Time
01

Zollikon

Switzerland

Our Zollikon location sits in one of Zurich's most sought-after residential areas — quiet, refined, and entirely private. Established in 2020, it brings the same founding philosophy to the northern shore of Lake Zurich. A space where the only thing that matters is your progress.

Fully equipped for personal training, body composition analysis, cryotherapy, and physiotherapy — all within a seamlessly private environment.

Address

8702 Zollikon

Get Directions Request Membership
02

Thalwil

Switzerland

Thalwil extends Tulua's private world to the southern shore of Lake Zurich — a location chosen for its discretion, accessibility, and the calibre of the community it serves.

The same rigorous standard as Zollikon. The same hand-picked team of trainers and therapists. For members who value the flexibility of two world-class facilities within twenty minutes of each other.

The Environment

The Recovery
Cryo & Physio

What to Expect

A different kind
of experience.

From the moment you walk in, every detail has been considered. Not to impress — but to remove every possible distraction from what you came to do.

"I've been a member since 2016. I've never once had to wait, share a machine, or lower my standards."

— Private Member, Thalwil · since 2016
i
Arrive to your own space
Sessions are booked privately. When you arrive, the club is yours. No waiting, no strangers, no noise.
ii
Your trainer knows your program
Every session picks up exactly where the last one ended. Continuity is built into how we work — never assumed.
iii
Recovery is part of the session
Physiotherapy, cryotherapy, and massage are integrated into your program — not afterthoughts you book separately.
iv
Flexibility without compromise
Early mornings, late evenings, Sundays on request — your schedule drives ours. Both locations available to all members.
v
Absolute discretion, structurally
Our members include executives and public figures. Confidentiality isn't a policy — it's built into how the club is designed and operated.

Find Us

Both clubs,
one standard.

Zollikon and Thalwil are twenty minutes apart on the shores of Lake Zurich. Your membership gives you full access to both — schedule whichever suits your day.
